_doc: Call boundary for resolveBrandDomain() and the stage wrapper runBrandResolver().

call_shape.config: object — consumed for LLM routing (hasLlmRouteApiKey, llmTimeoutMs)
call_shape.logger: object|null — used for LLM error logging (brand_resolver_llm_error)

registry_settings_consumed._note: No brand-resolver-specific registry settings. Confidence is LLM-derived via parseConfidence(). Crawl config for brand promotions is now a static shape: { method: 'http', robots_txt_compliant: true } — no rate_limit_ms or timeout_ms. The former registry settings manufacturerCrawlRateLimitMs and manufacturerCrawlTimeoutMs were deleted on 2026-03-23.

storage_contract.write: storage.upsertBrandDomain({ brand, category, official_domain, aliases, support_domain, confidence })
storage_contract._jsdoc: BrandDomainRow typedef: { brand, category, official_domain, aliases, support_domain, confidence }

call_shape.logger: object|null — passed through to resolveBrandDomainFn and used for event emission

stage_wrapper.di_seam_note: resolveBrandDomainFn now receives logger as a parameter alongside brand, category, config, callLlmFn, storage

caller_gates: runDiscoverySeedPlan() only attempts resolution when a brand is present in job
runBrandResolver() only creates callLlmFn when hasLlmRouteApiKey(config, { role: 'triage' }) is true
resolveBrandDomainFn receives logger so LLM errors are logged as brand_resolver_llm_error

promotion_inputs._note: Promotion logic is inline in runDiscoverySeedPlan.js (lines 129-147), not a separate module.
promotion_inputs.inline_logic: Normalizes officialDomain, builds host entry with crawlConfig { method: 'http', robots_txt_compliant: true }, pushes to categoryConfig.sourceHosts/sourceHostMap/approvedRootDomains
